title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: The condition `shouldUseCache := k8cache.IsKubernetesResourceAPIPath(r.URL.Path) && k8cache.IsAuthBypassURL(r.URL.Path)` is potentially confusing: `IsAuthBypassURL` returns `true` for paths that should be cached (i.e. are NOT auth-bypass endpoints). The naming implies the opposite. Consider renaming to `IsAuthRequiredURL` or `RequiresAuthErrorHandling` for clarity.
Refactoring `apiIdx` logic into `kubernetesResourceAPIPathIndex` eliminates three copies of the same pattern in `GetAPIGroup`, `ExtractNamespace`, and the new function — reduces drift risk.
New test cases for `GetAPIGroup` with direct `/api/v1/pods` and `/apis/apps/v1/deployments` paths fill a gap where only `/clusters/...` paths were previously tested.
